# Project Guidelines

## Code Style
*Tulis coding preference kau kat sini. Guna strict linting and prettier.*
*e.g., Follow TypeScript strict mode, always use functional components in React.*

## Architecture
*Folder ni untuk central-infra. Letak sikit context pasal architecture.*
*e.g., All cloud infrastructure logic is under `src/infra`, strictly modular.*

## Build and Test
*Macam mana nak run benda ni beb?*
- Build: `npm run build`
- Test: `npm run test`

## Conventions
*Pantang larang masa ngoding.*
*e.g., Don't use `Any` in Typescript, no cap. Always write tests for new modules.*
